summary: Full testing of LS Tech IA landing page. All major features working correctly including hero, services, about, contact, footer, and chatbot with real AI integration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Hero section loads with badge, headline, buttons, neural orb and particles. Header has LS Tech IA logo (no OSINT). 6 service cards present. About section has Missão/Visão/Diferencial. Contact has WhatsApp and Email buttons. Footer shows 2026 copyright. Chatbot opens/closes, shows initial message, sends messages, receives AI responses, and shows contact buttons on contact intent.
